events.label: reasoning
events.text: We need answer JSON only. Need evaluate sequence check for wire pulling feeders & branch industrial site. Observed field condition: exceeded sidewall pressure/jamming (planning item). Work actively in progress. Reference NEC 200.6, 210.5 identification. Need decide pass/fail/needs_more_info. Since exceeded sidewall pressure/jamming is a planning item? It says planning item. Need catch sequence violation. We need state what must happen before work can continue. Since condition is exceeded sidewall pressure/jamning during pulling, likely fail: pulling must stop, assess conduit fill, lubrication, pulling tension, equipment, route, etc. Must correct before continuing. Component condition installed-defective maybe. Risk high/critical? Exceeded sidewall pressure can damage insulation, create faults, fire, arc flash. Industrial site heavy. Decision fail. Work_stage in-progress. percent_complete maybe 50? value not asked; leave 0. sound_source etc default empty? Schema includes fields; can set empty string, 0.0. order maybe not audio task; empty list. workable empty list. findings: sidewall pressure/jamming exceeded during pull, potential insulation damage, NEC identification compromised? actions: stop pull, inspect cable/conduit, relieve tension, verify conduit fill/bending radius, use proper pulling lubricant, recalculate tension/sidewall pressure, replace damaged conductors, re-identify per NEC 200.6/210.5, re-pull with correct methods. references: NEC 200.6, 210.5, maybe NFPA 70B? But only given references. Need include rationale. Need ensure valid JSON. No prose outside.
